_invariant: All edges connect exactly one token node and one protocol node. USDe-aave_v3-collateral models Ethena USDe as collateral on Aave V3 Ethereum (mono_pool, governance-controlled single AaveOracle source per asset). This snapshot records the oracle source = NEW 0xc26d...4ff8 (hardcoded USDe = USDT 1:1 stable adapter) whose depeg_sensitive = false: it prices USDe at USDT/USD and IGNORES a USDe depeg, so a USDe deviation no longer liquidates borrowers (the depeg risk has moved to the Aave protocol as latent bad-debt exposure). Identical to usde_depeg_sensitive.json except oracle.oracle_address and oracle.depeg_sensitive.

meta.data_source: on-chain archive read (re-measured 2026-06-07): AaveOracle(0x54586bE62E3c3580375aE3723C145253060Ca0C2).getSourceOfAsset(USDe) @ block 22002625 -> 0xc26d4a1c46d884cff6de9800b6ae7a8cf48b4ff8 (NEW source). Block ts MEASURED = 1741442507 = 2025-03-08T14:01:47Z. Source flipped across exactly one block (22002624 -> 22002625). USDe market price unchanged at swap: OLD source-feed.latestAnswer @22002625 = $0.998857; NEW adapter.latestAnswer @22002625 = $0.999800 (returns USDT/USD ~1.00) -> NO depeg, pure config event.

metadata._note: Ethena synthetic dollar (delta-neutral basis position). NOT a hard-redeemable fiat stablecoin; secondary-market USDe price can transiently discount during high redemptions / thin sell-side liquidity.

oracle.oracle_provider: Hardcoded USDe=USDT 1:1 stable adapter (prices USDe at USDT/USD)

meta.data_source: AaveOracle.getSourceOfAsset(0x4c9E...68B3) @ block 22002625 -> 0xc26d...4ff8 (NEW source = hardcoded USDe=USDT 1:1 stable adapter, depeg-INsensitive) [MEASURED 2026-06-07]. depeg_sensitive=false classified from feed TYPE (a fixed-peg adapter: latestAnswer @22002625 = $0.999800 returning USDT/USD regardless of USDe market price) + Aave gov rationale (a USDe deviation no longer liquidates borrowers; risk moved to the protocol). USDe was NOT depegged at the swap (market = $0.998857) — pure config event.
